title: Short title
doc_html:
PART X.  LOUISIANA SECURITIES LAW

§701.  Short title

This Part X of Chapter 2 of Title 51 of the Louisiana Revised Statutes of 1950 shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Securities Law".  

Acts 1985, No. 722, §1.

PART X.  LOUISIANA SECURITIES LAW
§701.  Short title
This Part X of Chapter 2 of Title 51 of the Louisiana Revised Statutes of 1950 shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Securities Law".
Acts 1985, No. 722, §1.
